ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller */,
  "mcu_model" TEXT /* Model name of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "reference_manual" TEXT /* File path to the reference manual */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the microcontroller */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins in the microcontroller */,
  "operating_voltage" TEXT /* Operating voltage range */,
  "operating_temperature" TEXT /* Operating temperature range */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the microcontroller's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_bits" (
  "bit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration bit */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller the bit belongs to */,
  "bit_number" INTEGER /* Bit number within the configuration register */,
  "bit_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration bit */,
  "use_description" TEXT /* Description of the bit's use */,
  "reference_page" TEXT /* Page number in the reference manual */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the bit */,
  "bit_group" TEXT /* Group of configuration bits */,
  "bit_type" TEXT /* Type of the bit */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the bit */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the bit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the configuration bit information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_bits_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontroller_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller instance */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller model */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instance */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the microcontroller is installed in */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the microcontroller was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the microcontroller (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the microcontroller instance */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test or calibration */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the last test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the instance information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microcontroller_instances_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microcontroller_instances_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_models ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_models" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product model */,
  "product_model" TEXT /* Model name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date production ended */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the product model information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller instance */,
  "bit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration bit */,
  "value" TEXT /* Current value of the bit */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the setting */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in configuration */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the change */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the change was validated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES microcontroller_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_bit_id FOREIGN KEY ("bit_id") REFERENCES configuration_bits ("bit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, supervisor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration bit */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration bit */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in configuration */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the change */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the change was validated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES configuration_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference material */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller the material belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the reference material */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference material */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference material */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the reference material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_materials_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action allowed (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific resource (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES microcontroller_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, change setting) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the action was performed on */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the audit log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., current settings, historical changes) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report generation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
